title: AutoTool Switcher
description: Automatically equips the most efficient tool for breaking blocks.
body:
## 🔄 AutoTool Switcher

🛠️ Automatically selects the **best tool** from your hotbar when breaking or interacting with blocks. No more manual switching — faster, smoother gameplay! ⚡

### ✨ Features

*   ✔️ Supports pickaxes, axes, shovels & more
*   ✔️ Works in Survival and Multiplayer 🌍
*   ✔️ Toggleable with a command (enable / disable anytime) ⌨️
    *   /autotoolswitcher (off/on)

### 🎮 How it Works

When you aim at a block, the mod detects which tool breaks it the fastest and instantly switches to it. Simple and efficient!

## 📬 Contact
